第11章 市場反応分析 (II)

課題1

library(mlogit)

# mlogit関数用にデータを加工
soydata <- mlogit.data(data_soy, choice = "choice", shape = "wide", varying = c(4:12), sep = ".")

# 多項ロジットモデルの推定
out <- mlogit(choice ~ price+disp+ad, data = soydata)
summary(out)
## 
## Call:
## mlogit(formula = choice ~ price + disp + ad, data = soydata, 
##     method = "nr")
## 
## Frequencies of alternatives:choice
##       A       B       C 
## 0.16395 0.40465 0.43140 
## 
## nr method
## 6 iterations, 0h:0m:0s 
## g'(-H)^-1g = 1.1E-05 
## successive function values within tolerance limits 
## 
## Coefficients :
##                 Estimate Std. Error  z-value  Pr(>|z|)    
## (Intercept):B  -0.156091   0.072655  -2.1484 0.0316840 *  
## (Intercept):C   2.385687   0.081173  29.3900 < 2.2e-16 ***
## price         -10.047366   0.373369 -26.9100 < 2.2e-16 ***
## disp            0.275219   0.075820   3.6299 0.0002835 ***
## ad              0.963954   0.157353   6.1261 9.008e-10 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Log-Likelihood: -2331
## McFadden R^2:  0.39191 
## Likelihood ratio test : chisq = 3004.6 (p.value = < 2.22e-16)

課題2

# 選択型コンジョイント分析
milkdata <- mlogit.data(data_milk,choice = "choice", shape = "wide",
                        varying = c(3:23), sep = ".")
out <- mlogit(choice ~ int+haccp+eco+bb7+price145+price150+price155-1, data = milkdata)
summary(out)
## 
## Call:
## mlogit(formula = choice ~ int + haccp + eco + bb7 + price145 + 
##     price150 + price155 - 1, data = milkdata, method = "nr")
## 
## Frequencies of alternatives:choice
##      A      B      C 
## 0.4375 0.3250 0.2375 
## 
## nr method
## 5 iterations, 0h:0m:0s 
## g'(-H)^-1g = 3.34E-06 
## successive function values within tolerance limits 
## 
## Coefficients :
##          Estimate Std. Error z-value  Pr(>|z|)    
## int       2.13774    0.69355  3.0823  0.002054 ** 
## haccp     1.03925    0.50580  2.0547  0.039911 *  
## eco       2.34426    0.41960  5.5869 2.312e-08 ***
## bb7       0.68178    0.53999  1.2626  0.206739    
## price145  0.48598    0.65775  0.7389  0.459994    
## price150  0.45296    0.56646  0.7996  0.423923    
## price155  0.60444    0.65322  0.9253  0.354793    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Log-Likelihood: -60.512

分析結果
